name: secure-exec
description: Secure Node.js Execution Without a Sandbox  A lightweight library for secure Node.js execution. No containers, no VMs — just npm-compatible sandboxing out of the box.
summaryZh: Secure Node.js Execution Without a Sandbox  A lightweight library for secure Node.js execution. No containers, no VMs — just npm-compatible sandboxing out of the box. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
